title: KGX + RDF/Turtle + JSON-LD + Neo4j exports w/ per-export license manifests
context: Downstream consumers need the knowledge graph in multiple standard formats. Each export must ship with a license manifest naming every source, version, and required citation. CC0 core and CC-BY/CC-BY-SA overlays must be separately packaged to avoid license contamination. Exports must round-trip (re-import and validate against the schema). Depends on full validation (oncogene-kg-validate-001).
objective: Implement export pipelines producing KGX (TSV+JSON), RDF/Turtle, JSON-LD, and Neo4j dump formats with stable IRIs/CURIEs, per-export license manifests naming every source and required attribution, and separately packaged CC0 core vs CC-BY/CC-BY-SA overlays. Verify round-trip re-import.
acceptanceCriteria: Produces valid KGX (TSV+JSON), RDF/Turtle, JSON-LD, and Neo4j dump with stable IRIs/CURIEs.
Each export ships a license manifest (LICENSES.md/ATTRIBUTION.md) naming every source, version, and required citation.
CC0 core and CC-BY/CC-BY-SA overlays are packaged separately in each export format.
Exports round-trip: re-import of KGX and JSON-LD validates against the Biolink/SHACL schema.
Export pipeline is re-runnable and produces stable output for a given graph state.
A brief export README documents the formats, file layout, and how to load each format.
output: export/ directory with export pipeline code and generated output/ files in all four formats with license manifests, committed via PR with CI green.
